name: HWR_WLNS_ASSESSMENT
description: This table will be used to store wellness assessments.

columns.Name: USER_ID
columns.Comments: This is the wellness user id.

columns.Name: QUESTIONNAIRE_ID
columns.Comments: This is the wellness active questionnaire id.

columns.Name: LAST_ASSESSMENT_DATE
columns.Comments: Corresponds to the ASSESSMENT_SCORE field value change.

columns.Name: ASSESSMENT_CALC_RULE_CODE
columns.Comments: This column stores the wellness questionnaire calculation rule for calculating overall score.

columns.Name: ASSESSMENT_SCORE
columns.Comments: This column stores the wellness assessment score for the questionnaire of the wellness user.

columns.Name: ASSESSMENT_TOTAL_SCORE
columns.Comments: This column stores the wellness questionnaire total score.

columns.Name: SCORED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates questionnaire is a scored questionnaire.

columns.Name: WLNS_ASSESS_ATTR_1
columns.Comments: WLNS_ASSESS_ATTR_1. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: WLNS_ASSESS_ATTR_2
columns.Comments: WLNS_ASSESS_ATTR_2. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
